name: From Zurich: rafting adventure on the Lütschine in Interlaken
description: Discover From Zurich: rafting adventure on the Lütschine in Interlaken in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Zurich: rafting adventure on the Lütschine in Interlaken in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Rafting
subcategory.description: Dare a guided rafting tour with optional barbecue and book right here. River rafting is the perfect mix of refreshing relaxation and sporting activity. You cross idyllic alpine landscapes and directly experience the wild and untouched nature. It is not for nothing that rafting is also called white water rafting. With its many rivers with strom rapids of varying degrees, Switzerland is perfect for rafting.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
